description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on the rust:1.44.1 Docker image. Add a before_script step that installs the rustfmt and clippy components via rustup component add rustfmt clippy. Define a test job named test in the default test stage that executes the following shell commands in order: rustc --version && cargo --version, cargo test --verbose --jobs 1, cargo fmt --all -- --check, and cargo clippy --all. The pipeline does not use any services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
